properties.name: syft:image:labels:description
properties.value: OpenBao is a tool for securely accessing secrets. A secret is anything that you want to tightly control access to, such as API keys, passwords, certificates, and more. OpenBao provides a unified interface to any secret, while providing tight access control and recording a detailed audit log.

properties.name: syft:image:labels:summary
properties.value: OpenBao is a tool for securely accessing secrets.
